_note: plan-ledger MCP server for Cursor 3.x. The server registers 42+ tools (growing toward ~47); Cursor 2.4+ dropped the old 40-tool cap and lazy-loads MCP tools, so the full surface works with no clipping. Copy this into ~/.cursor/mcp.json (all projects) or a project .cursor/mcp.json (this repo); adjust the path in args to where plan-ledger is installed. '_note' is an inert annotation Cursor ignores — delete it if a strict JSON parser ever complains. See docs/CURSOR.md.
